name: John Frederick Coots
abstract: John Frederick Coots, better known as J. Fred Coots or Fred Coots, (May 2, 1897 – April 8, 1985) was an American songwriter.

works_created.t: Santa Claus is Coming to Town
Santa Claus is Coming to Town
Santa Claus is Coming to Town

about_quotes.speaker: Keith Ingham
about_quotes.evidence: She says yeah there’s a guy called J. Fred Coots who wrote “You Go To My Head”... I said, “yeah?”
about_quotes.doc_title: Keith Ingham interviewed by Monk Rowe, Chautauqua, New York, September 12, 1997
